summary: Full first-finish testing of StrataViz marketing site (backend + frontend). All requested features verified end-to-end.
passed: GET /api/downloads returns exactly 3 builds in order windows, mac_apple_silicon, mac_intel with all required fields (platform, label, subtitle, file_ext, version, file_size, file_url, download_count)
POST /api/downloads/windows/track increments download_count (1 -> 2 -> 3) and returns updated build
POST /api/subscribe with valid email creates subscriber (200) and returns object with id/email/role/created_at
POST /api/subscribe with duplicate email returns SAME subscriber (same id, no duplicate)
Landing page loads with all sections (Navbar, Hero, Marquee, Manifesto, Features, Downloads, Subscribe, Footer)
Downloads section renders 3 cards with data-testid download-card-windows/mac_apple_silicon/mac_intel with correct labels, version v1.0.0, file sizes (182MB/176MB/189MB), extensions
'Recommended' badge shown on OS-detected platform (Windows in this test env)
Clicking download-button-windows fires POST /api/downloads/windows/track and DB count incremented (verified 2 -> 3 via subsequent GET)
Subscribe form submit: API called with 200, form replaced by success state 'You're on the list. We'll keep you posted.' and success toast shown
hero-download-button, nav-link-features, nav-link-manifesto, nav-link-downloads data-testids all present
notes: Download button uses anchor download; the placeholder file_url (downloads.strataviz.app) 404s as expected per the review note. The click still fires the track API, which was verified. Toast on download click was not visually confirmed because the page began the download navigation immediately, but the track API call was captured on the network layer and the counter incremented in the DB.
